selections.name: TURN IT LOOSE
selections.reason: Projects as the lone early speed from the rail, a massive advantage on this tight bullring oval. Should clear and control the pace.

selections.name: AMPLIFY
selections.reason: Tactical presser drawn well inside. Has the class and speed figures to capitalize if the top pick falters.

selections.name: SHORT SPEECH
selections.reason: Consistent presser but drawn a bit wide. Will need to navigate the tight turns carefully to factor late.

selections.name: DEARLY DEPARTED
selections.reason: Sustained closer who may be at a disadvantage on this track profile, but can pick up pieces for the exotics.

danger_horse.name: HYPER HOLIDAY
danger_horse.reason: Taking a significant class drop and could wake up against this softer field.

selections.name: LT. NORM
selections.reason: Pace meltdown expected with multiple early speed types. Perfectly drawn inside to stalk, save ground, and pounce late.

selections.name: ROCKETS RED FLAIR
selections.reason: Owns the highest base speed figures but must overcome an outside post and a contested pace scenario.

selections.name: PLEASE THE COURT
selections.reason: Solid presser who should get a favorable trip sitting just behind the early duelers.

selections.name: YOU VEE CEE
selections.reason: Classy closer who will benefit from the fast early fractions, though the track bias works against his running style.

danger_horse.name: SHIP BOSS
danger_horse.reason: Drawn the rail with early speed, but risks getting caught in a grueling pace duel.

selections.name: AMERICAN WITT
selections.reason: Looks like the controlling lone speed in this field. Inside draw at 5.5 furlongs makes him the clear one to catch.

selections.name: PREACHERS SECRET
selections.reason: Consistent presser with solid speed figures. Will get first run at the leader if the pace is honest.

selections.name: JUDGE OLIVER
selections.reason: Showed improvement in recent starts and maps out a good stalking trip from an inside post.

selections.name: MO MAMBO
selections.reason: Has tactical speed but drawn outside. Needs a clean break to secure early positioning.

danger_horse.name: FROSTED MUG
danger_horse.reason: Rail draw is beneficial, but lacks the early foot to take advantage of the track bias.

selections.name: HIGH MILER
selections.reason: Possesses a massive early pace advantage and the rail draw. Should clear easily and prove tough to run down.

selections.name: LITTLE TRIBUNE
selections.reason: Best of the rest on paper. Tactical presser who will track the top pick from a good inside post.

selections.name: MY LITTLE TOOTSIE
selections.reason: Has shown flashes of ability and can hit the board if the pace collapses.

selections.name: GRENACHE
selections.reason: Sustained runner who will be passing tired horses late, though the outside post is a negative.

danger_horse.name: COUNTING ON YOU
danger_horse.reason: Inside draw could allow for a ground-saving trip to sneak into the superfecta.

selections.name: CUMBERLAND FALLS
selections.reason: Perfect setup. Drawn the rail with a stalking style in a race loaded with outside early speed. Will save ground and pounce.

selections.name: PHUNK
selections.reason: Another inside presser who stands to benefit immensely from the projected pace meltdown.

selections.name: THORN CROWN
selections.reason: Classy veteran with tactical speed. Outside post is tricky but has the figures to contend.

selections.name: QUEEN OF ATTITUDE
selections.reason: Very fast early, but likely to be caught in a grueling duel with other front-runners.

danger_horse.name: EAST COAST COWGIRL
danger_horse.reason: Dangerous speed but faces severe pace pressure from her inside and outside.

selections.name: LIVININTHEFASTLANE
selections.reason: Owns the best recent speed figures in a field lacking early pace. Should be able to dictate terms.

selections.name: SGT. FILKOW
selections.reason: Inside presser who gets a favorable pace projection. Consistent enough to hit the exotics.

selections.name: BROMEO
selections.reason: Showed some life in recent starts and fits well with this group.

selections.name: PLEASANT TIME
selections.reason: Rail draw is a major plus at this distance. Can save ground and grab a share.

danger_horse.name: HUEYSSUCCESS
danger_horse.reason: Has some tactical speed but must overcome the far outside post.

selections.name: CALMING FORCE
selections.reason: Drawn well inside and projects to get a perfect stalking trip behind a heavily contested pace.

selections.name: TIZ ROMANTIC
selections.reason: Classy closer who will relish the fast early fractions. The pace meltdown brings him right into the picture.

selections.name: MESSI THE GREAT
selections.reason: Tactical runner who can sit mid-pack and make a strong late run.

selections.name: MY LIAM
selections.reason: Very fast early speed but risks getting caught in a duel with the inside and outside speed horses.

danger_horse.name: FLEET OF HOOF
danger_horse.reason: Consistent presser who could pick up the pieces if the front-runners completely collapse.

selections.name: BETTERLUCKNEXTTIME
selections.reason: Controlling speed on the rail is a golden profile at Assiniboia. Should dictate the pace from start to finish.

selections.name: GHOST YA
selections.reason: Solid presser drawn well inside. Will get the first run at the leader if the pace gets too hot.

selections.name: WITT'S TEN TOUCH
selections.reason: Has tactical speed to stay close but must overcome the outside post.

selections.name: SAINT GEORGE
selections.reason: Sustained closer who can hit the board if the pace is faster than expected.

danger_horse.name: SHOCKING MALICE
danger_horse.reason: Inside draw and pressing style makes him a threat for the lower exotics.
